hub_subtitle: Business English para Missões Internacionais e Pequenos Negócios

lesson.menu_title: Right Now -- What Is Happening Today
lesson.menu_desc: Describe what is happening at this moment at an international fair with am / is / are + -ing -- 33 slides
lesson.subtitle: Lesson 7 -- Right Now: What Is Happening Today
lesson.title_tag: Professor View -- Flávia Florêncio Ferreira | Lesson 7 -- Right Now: What Is Happening Today

listenings.text: Hi Flavia, it's Nina. I am calling from the main hall. Right now, the fair is very busy. People are visiting the booths, and a speaker is presenting a new project on the stage. Two partners are waiting at our booth to meet you. I am preparing the table now, and the audience is arriving. Please come quickly, because everyone is waiting for you!

Good afternoon, everyone, and welcome to the International Small Business Fair. The event is starting now. On the main stage, a speaker is presenting a new project. In Hall B, three companies are showing their products, and many visitors are taking photos. Our team is waiting at booth twelve to meet you. Right now, coffee is available near the entrance. We are opening the doors, so please come in. Enjoy the fair!

extra_audio.text: It is nine o'clock, and the fair is opening now. First, the visitors are arriving at the entrance. Then the companies are opening their booths. On the main stage, a speaker is starting a speech. At our booth, my colleague is preparing the table. Right now, two partners are waiting to meet us.
